CREATE TABLE test_dict (key VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255));
UPDATE test_dict SET value = 'new_value1' WHERE key = 'key1';
INSERT INTO test_dict (key, value) SELECT 'key4', 'value4' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_dict WHERE key = 'key4');
UPDATE test_dict SET value = 'updated_value3' WHERE key IN (SELECT key FROM test_dict WHERE value = 'value3');
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM test_dict WHERE key = 'key1') AS key_exists;
INSERT INTO test_dict (key, value) SELECT 'key1', 'another_value' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_dict WHERE key = 'key1');
SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM test_dict WHERE key = 'key3') THEN 'Exists' ELSE 'Does not exist' END AS key_status;
DELETE FROM test_dict WHERE key NOT IN (SELECT key FROM test_dict WHERE value LIKE 'value%');
